name: devenv
onCreateCommand:
((printf "\033[1;34m[setup] Starting scalaOnCreateCommand.sh\033[0m
" && (cd . && printf '%s' "" | base64 -d | bash -euo pipefail && printf "\033[1;32m[setup] Finished scalaOnCreateCommand.sh\033[0m
") || printf "\033[1;31m[setup] Errored! scalaOnCreateCommand.sh\033[0m
")) 2>&1 | sudo tee /var/log/on-create.log
postCreateCommand:
((printf "\033[1;34m[setup] Starting misePostCreateCommand.sh\033[0m
" && (cd . && printf '%s' "" | base64 -d | bash -euo pipefail && printf "\033[1;32m[setup] Finished misePostCreateCommand.sh\033[0m
") || printf "\033[1;31m[setup] Errored! misePostCreateCommand.sh\033[0m
")) 2>&1 | sudo tee /var/log/post-create.log
